pageContext.name: V.S.O.F. Great Mazinger
pageContext.description: Presenting the Super Soft Vinyl Robot Series 'Vinyl Shogun Omega Force'! Sideshow and Good Smile Company present the Great Mazinger Vinyl Collectible!  This figure in the chibi soft vinyl figure series 'V.S.O.F. (Vinyl Shogun Omega Force)' is the super robot Great Mazinger! Hailing from the manga and anime series Great Mazinger, this design has also appeared in other works within the Mazinger canon as well as multiple games in the Super Robot Wars franchise! The figure stands at 240mm tall and features detailed sculptwork and a strong standing pose. Be sure to add this soft vinyl figure to your collection!
